title: Meniscium reticulatum
taxonomy: Meniscium reticulatum is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Meniscium, which is a group of ferns that are characterized by their unique leaf morphology. Meniscium reticulatum is further classified as a member of the Thelypteridaceae family, which includes about 1,500 species of ferns. The family Thelypteridaceae is a part of the order Polypodiales, which includes various families of ferns. This classification places Meniscium reticulatum within the broader group of vascular plants, specifically the ferns.
